overall.description: A first-person driving sequence through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers and a lengthy passage under an elevated highway with prominent red underlighting. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the game's cinematic lighting and wet road reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial district street approaching elevated highway

events.description: vehicle with bright headlights passes by on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked neon city streets approaching an overpass structure

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on moving in the same direction, slightly ahead

entered.detail: large green neon sign with oriental characters mounted on a building facade
tall cylindrical tower with distinctive red circular logo lighting
rain-soaked multi-lane road reflecting neon lights
cluster of high-rise buildings covered in colorful neon advertisements
elevated highway structure looming ahead with concrete supports

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, with the camera driving forward through wet asphalt reflecting vibrant neon lights. The Oriental neon sign and Arasaka Tower dominate the skyline ahead while the vehicle approaches an elevated highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass entry with concrete infrastructure

events.description: entering the covered roadway beneath the elevated highway overpass
ambient lighting shifts to darker tones as the vehicle moves deeper under the structure

agents.ego_description: entering the covered roadway under the elevated highway, navigating between concrete pillars

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure with metal support beams
thick concrete columns supporting the overhead highway deck
large illuminated advertising screens mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the semi-covered space beneath the elevated highway, transitioning from the open street to a concrete corridor. Massive support pillars line the left side while the Arasaka Tower remains visible in the distance to the right, and digital billboards illuminate the left periphery.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit highway underpass corridor with red underlighting

events.description: intense red neon lights lining the underside of the overpass become prominently visible
large truck passes on the right side, temporarily occupying the adjacent lane

agents.ego_description: speeding through the long neon-lit corridor under the highway, surrounded by traffic in both lanes

notable_agents.action: large commercial truck driving parallel in the right lane, headlights illuminating the road

entered.detail: continuous strip of intense red neon lighting running along the underside of the highway deck
low concrete dividers separating the roadway from the sidewalk area

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a prolonged drive through a narrow corridor beneath the highway, dominated by intense red neon lights lining the overhead structure. The vehicle navigates through moderate traffic including a large truck on the right, while digital billboards and concrete barriers line the sides of the rain-slicked roadway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city that transitions from an open, neon-lit skyline into a claustrophobic, red-lit industrial corridor. It begins on a wet asphalt street where the camera moves toward the towering Arasaka Tower and vibrant Oriental neon signs reflecting off the pavement. As the vehicle approaches an elevated highway, the scene shifts from the open city air into a semi-covered concrete space lined with massive support pillars and glowing digital billboards. The environment then narrows further into a prolonged passage beneath the overpass, where the lighting transforms into an intense, dominant red glow emanating from the overhead structure. Finally, the camera navigates through moderate traffic and past a large truck, continuing along the rain-slicked roadway flanked by concrete barriers and flickering advertisements.
